name: sagarpanda-site
_comment: Required now: several homepage/lightbox customizations use Tailwind classes beyond what the theme ships precompiled. `npm run compile` regenerates assets/css/compiled.css (a site-level override, doesn't touch the theme submodule) by scanning both this repo's layouts/assets/js AND the theme's, since Tailwind v4's auto-detection scans the whole project tree from wherever package.json lives.
